section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports tenderness on the medial joint line of his knee.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Tenderness on palpation is a physical exam finding observed by the clinician, not something a patient can reliably report as a discrete anatomic sign.

section_miscategorizations.text: The clinician describes their profession as a baby rocker in a children's hospital.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is patient history/social information, not an observed clinical finding, exam, or test result.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports negative McMurray tests on both knees.
section_miscategorizations.reason: McMurray test results are objective exam findings and should be documented as clinician-observed, not as patient-reported information.
